name: media-gestures
description: Built-in media control gestures for play/pause, volume up/down, and next/previous track.
author: Maestro Project

name: scroll-wheel
description: Smooth scroll control using hand tilt angle. Scroll documents, web pages and terminals hands-free.
author: Maestro Project

name: workspace-switcher
description: Switch between virtual desktops/workspaces using swipe gestures. Supports Windows (Task View), macOS Spaces, and Linux (EWMH).
author: Maestro Project

name: zoom-gesture
description: Pinch-to-zoom using two-hand distance: triggers Ctrl+Plus / Ctrl+Minus for browser and image zoom.
author: Maestro Project

name: voice-annotation
description: Combine a gesture with a spoken label to annotate screenshots or PDFs hands-free.
author: Community
